title: Belgium looks to take control of nuclear reactors in energy push
summary_full: Attention has refocused on nuclear power in Europe as a key source of energy as the Middle East War has sent oil and gas prices soaring
summary_public: Attention has refocused on nuclear power in Europe as a key source of energy as the Middle East War has sent oil and gas prices soaring
